patterns: Pattern 1: Pages follow flex-1 flex-col layout pattern - NO overflow-y-auto on page wrappers (Layout Contract)
Pattern 2: Forms use react-hook-form with zodResolver and typed generics: useForm<FormInput, unknown, FormData>
Pattern 3: Each page has PageHeader with breadcrumbs array and optional actions prop
Pattern 4: Cards use shadcn Card/CardHeader/CardTitle/CardContent consistently
Pattern 5: Sidebar uses configNav array for config group items - simple filter to remove 3 items
Pattern 6: App uses HashRouter (main.tsx line 13) with Routes component - NOT a data router
Pattern 7: Hooks live in src/renderer/src/hooks/ with use* naming convention
Pattern 8: Components live in src/renderer/src/componentes/ (Portuguese naming)
Pattern 9: shadcn components in src/renderer/src/components/ui/ (already have Tabs, Collapsible, AlertDialog)
Pattern 10: ConfiguracoesPagina has iaForm with useForm - card IA is lines 521-694

Pattern 11: ColaboradorDetalhe is 1311 lines with 7 distinct sections: Info Pessoal (Card A, L595-663), Contrato (Card B, L665-778), Preferencias (Card C, L780-845), Regras Horario (Card E, L848-1044), Excecoes Data (Card F, L1046-1108), Excecoes (Card D, L1110-1178), Dialogs (L1182-1311)
Pattern 12: ColaboradorDetalhe has colabForm covering Cards A-C (react-hook-form), while Cards E-F-G use raw useState
Pattern 13: tools.ts applyColaboradorDefaults at line 1078: if (!dados.sexo) dados.sexo = 'M' - called at lines 1650 and 2463
Pattern 14: colabSchema already has z.enum(['M', 'F']) with message, but defaultValues has sexo: 'M' at line 183
Pattern 15: Tour system references NAV_CONTRATOS and NAV_REGRAS steps that target sidebar items being removed
findings.approach: Execute in order Fase 3 -> 4 -> 5. Fase 3: Remove 3 items from configNav array in AppSidebar.tsx, add Collapsible section to ConfiguracoesPagina moving IA card inside and adding links card. Fase 4: CRITICAL - app uses HashRouter (not data router), so useBlocker will NOT work. Must implement dirty state with custom approach: intercept Link clicks via useNavigate wrapper + beforeunload for window close. Alternative: migrate HashRouter to createHashRouter (data router) to enable useBlocker - this is the cleaner solution (~20 lines change in main.tsx + App.tsx). Fase 5: Wrap ColaboradorDetalhe content in shadcn Tabs (Geral/Horarios/Ausencias), unify Cards A+B+C into single card, fix sexo default to empty string.
risks: CRITICAL: HashRouter does NOT support useBlocker - requires either migration to createHashRouter (data router) or custom dirty state implementation. The PRD assumes useBlocker works. Migration to createHashRouter is recommended but requires converting <Routes>/<Route> to route objects and using RouterProvider pattern.
Tour system (TourSetup.tsx) references NAV_CONTRATOS and NAV_REGRAS sidebar items at steps 7 and 11. Removing these sidebar items will break those tour steps - they need to be removed or reassigned.

ColaboradorDetalhe is 1311 lines - refactoring into tabs requires careful preservation of all useState and useEffect hooks that are shared across tabs (e.g., colabForm is used by Cards A-C but Save button is in PageHeader).
ColaboradorDetalhe Cards E-G use raw useState (not react-hook-form). Dirty state via colabForm.formState.isDirty only covers Cards A-C. PRD explicitly accepts this partial coverage.
ConfiguracoesPagina IA card is ~170 lines of JSX with complex state (provider configs, model catalog, etc). Moving it inside Collapsible requires careful cut-paste to preserve all closures.

sexo default fix in tools.ts: the applyColaboradorDefaults function is called from both 'criar' (L1650) and 'cadastrar_lote' (L2463). Both call sites need the sexo validation before defaults are applied.
ColaboradorDetalhe sexo default change from 'M' to '' - the Select component with empty string value may show empty trigger. Need placeholder text.
dependencies: shadcn/ui Tabs component - ALREADY INSTALLED at src/renderer/src/components/ui/tabs.tsx
shadcn/ui Collapsible component - ALREADY INSTALLED at src/renderer/src/components/ui/collapsible.tsx
shadcn/ui AlertDialog component - ALREADY INSTALLED at src/renderer/src/components/ui/alert-dialog.tsx
react-router-dom v7.1.0 - HashRouter in use, useBlocker available in react-router but requires data router
react-hook-form - all 4 target pages already use it with formState.isDirty available
lucide-react icons - FileText, ShieldCheck/Shield, Brain needed for links rapidos card

router_architecture.current: HashRouter (main.tsx L13) + Routes/Route (App.tsx L71-87) - legacy non-data router
router_architecture.migration_option: Convert to createHashRouter + RouterProvider. Requires: (1) route config object, (2) RouterProvider in main.tsx, (3) App becomes layout route. ~50 lines changed across main.tsx + App.tsx. All existing routes/navigation/useNavigate/useLocation continue working.
router_architecture.fallback_option: Custom hook with window.addEventListener('beforeunload') for tab close + custom navigation interception. Less robust - won't catch programmatic navigate() calls.

colaborador_detalhe_structure.form_scope: colabForm covers cards A-C only. Cards E-F use useState.

sexo_fix_locations.change: remove line, add toolError check before applyDefaults

target_card_order: Collapsible Avancado (contains: IA card + Links card)
